title: feat: enhance syncCommit logic for decision synthesis and significance gating
context:
- Introduced significance criteria for LLM synthesis based on structural changes, line churn, and commit body length.
- Updated syncCommit to handle re-synthesis with a --force option.
- Improved logging for decision seeding, detailing LLM vs heuristic usage.
- Added tests for significance gating and syncCommit behavior.
 What changed: added renderDiff, isSignificant, analysis; changed syncCommit.
decision: Introduced src/cli, src/extractors, src/mcp, src/synthesis, test/integration.test.ts, test/synthesis.test.ts: added renderDiff, isSignificant, analysis; changed syncCommit.
